docs:
# Card
Composable card primitive with header, content, and footer sections.
## Import
```tsx
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@/components/ui/card";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Card title="Project overview" description="Track milestones and team progress." showFooter fallback={undefined} size={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **title** (string) — default: `"Project overview"`: Title
- **description** (string) — default: `"Track milestones and team progress."`: Description
- **showFooter** (boolean) — default: `true`: Show footer
- **fallback** (string): Fallback
- **size** (string): Size
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add card
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/card
```
